template.name: RandomHeart
template.declaration:
clock t; // Measures time between intrinsic beats
// Heart intrinsic beat timing parameters const int minwait = 200; // min intrinsic beat interval (ms) (250 bpm) - allow it to be faster than upper rate limit interval to test edge cases const int maxwait = 2000; // max intrinsic beat interval (ms) (30 bpm)- make it larger than HRL_Interval, so theoretically should never use this time

template.name: VentricleController
Observer
template.declaration: clock tv; // Measures time since last ventricular event bool vstarted = false; // flag indicating if measurement started

nta.system: // Edit system definition system RandomHeart, VentricleController, Observer;

query.comment: PropLRI: If hysteresis mode is disabled, pacemaker should not pace intervals longer than Lower Rate Interval (LRI). -guaranteed by code
PropVRP: The pacemaker cannot sense beats before VRP has elapsed
PropHRI: If hysteresis pacing is activated, a ventricular pace or sense should be no later than HRI.
